feature.name: Agentic Federated Login
feature.creator: goto@google.com
feature.summary: A set of FedCM extensions to help agentic browsers safely log users in to websites using their federated accounts.

intake.finding: ChromeStatus record (created 2026-03-17 by goto@google.com). A set of FedCM extensions to help agentic browsers safely log users in to websites using their federated accounts. Category: Miscellaneous. Blink component: Blink>Identity>FedCM. Stars: 60.
intake.limitations: ChromeStatus record fields only; intent thread content not directly accessible.

wideReview.finding: Feature maps to official WebDX feature 'fedcm'. Cross-engine positions not verified in this report.

release.finding: Shipped in Chrome 148 (In developer trial (Behind a flag)).

adoption.finding: The WebDX/WebFeature counter 'Fedcm' (ChromeStatus timeline, bucket_id 247) measured 2.1970% of measured Chrome HTTP/HTTPS page loads on 2026-07-20. Tracked since 2024-12-10 with 557 data points. Mapping confidence: declared-family.
adoption.limitations: Counter measures the Fedcm family/property, not this specific feature. Does not isolate the Chrome 148 increment.

deprecation.finding: This is a capability addition or behavior change, not a deprecation.
